description: Part of an Arabic document. Likely a petition. Probably used at one point for a book binding. Portions of 5 lines are preserved. Mentions the closure of roads "ṣadd al-ṭuruqāt" and the zeal of the sender in servitude and gratitude. Mentions al-dayyān/al-rabbān Yūsuf b. Ṣadaqa al-Kalbī. Needs examination for content.
description_he: חלק ממסמך ערבי. ככל הנראה עצומה. מוזכרים סגירת דרכים ושם הדיין/הרבן יוסף בן צדקה אל-כלבי. דורש בדיקה לתוכן.
